calendar.matters:
FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Mar-27-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING , REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Sep-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marilyn Young for Barbara Lewis (Trustee).

The Court stated that this is a Trust, that the accountings are in the Estate and that the value of the new accounting should always start with the ending value of the prior accounting. Ms. Young stated that she is happy to do that in the next accounting and in a new trust case number. The Second Amended Ninth Account and Report of Trustee, etc. is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #7, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar May-08-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marilyn Young for Barbara Lewis (Trustee).

Ms. Young stated that the Trustee took $5,879.00 from the savings account, that the Trustee opened a Trust checking account at Wells Fargo Bank, that the balance in the savings is $2,500.00 and that this is how things will be managed going forward. The Court approved the Accounting Petition (subject to review of the order) and advised Ms. Young that the sum of $3,397.50 will be deducted from the Trustee's fees.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Clauzel.
